reviews.comment:
La chica de la playa no entendía que las luces de adentro se apagan automaticamente x ende no quería cargar nafta, saque las llaves y le mostraba que no tenía nada encendido.

(Translated by Google)
The girl on the beach didn't understand that the interior lights turn off automatically, so she didn't want to fill up with gas. I took out the keys and showed her that nothing was turned on.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLXzZfRzZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención en el servicompras, la joven que lo atiende en el turno mañana es muy atenta.
Muy ricas las "tortitas" y el "mil hojas de manteca" para acompañar el desayuno.
Baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the convenience store; the young woman who works the morning shift is very attentive.
The "tortitas" (small cakes) and the "mil hoja de manteca" (a type of puff pastry) are delicious with breakfast.
Clean restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5MlAyWC1nRRAB
